title: Document Envelope
description: Standard wrapper for content committed to by content chains. The documentCID in a content chain operation is CID(dagCborEncode(envelope)).

$schema.description: URI identifying the JSON Schema that validates this content.

content.description: Application-defined content payload. Opaque to chains — validated by the schema identified in $schema.

baseDocumentCID.description: CID of the previous document version (edit lineage), or null for the first version.

createdByDID.description: DID of the identity that created this document version.
